_comment: 21 hooks for clip_003 — round-robin slice of the 144-hook library from clip_001.
hooks:
POV you wear oversized clothes
because you want to hide…

"Is it pink?" no, its #FC94AF
(look it up)

Just the tip
never hurt a friendship

I hate old men but you calling me
good girl while gripping my hair
might change my mind.

what would you name
this moood?

do you know which lips
need more attention?

what i would look like
if i wasn't ugly

be honest how long did it take
until you saw it?

what I really want:
Dress (without dre)
Ink (without n)
Apple (without pple)

(now read it backwards)

if u are a straight guy
that likes girls with abs
stop scrolling and leave a ❤️

what I really want:

Mario (without the rio)
Sonic (without the nic)
Zelda (without the lda)
Kirby (without rby)

Now read it from the middle

men, be HONEST
what mistakes do most women make in bed?

some of you would fall in love
in 3 days flat

you'd like me more
if you knew me less

say something that would
actually make me stay

I'm fluent in 3 languages:
English, sarcasm, and touch

hooks._note: 2-segment: i might be a 6 but sitycimm

hooks._note: 4-segment: 3 things I would do on the first date

segments.text:
3 things I would do
on the first date

invite you to my house
so I can cook for you
